name: The whole gangs here AGAIN🥹
description:
~ showing up at their door! ~

I thought the thingy was cool but it doesn't fully appear in the bio😣 it's fine though. This took too long considering it's just a pov change. Aka an any pov bot of my micha pov thing. This is fun with msak pov or smth because that's the only pov I tested it with. I don't usually test my bots but i just wanted to make sure that due to having multiple characters in the definition that it wouldn't get mixed up. It does get mixed up sometime sadly. Anyway my phones kinda fucked up rn so I'll probably be alot slower then I was before because whenever i write thing my phone kinda like deletes it it then I have to write it again then yk yk. Again.

If the bot is getting pov wrong too much you can use invisible text to kinda stir the bot to what you wanna do!!! Thing for that: [](#'invisible text goes here')

Sorry for the slow down in bots!! Don't beat me to death!!! Anyway either stocky bot, expunged bot, or 'John grace' (THEIR NAME IS SINNER YOU FAKE ASS FANS JOHN GRACE WAS JUST A JOKE LIKE HOW PEOPLE CALL ERAM JOHN MANTLE BY YOUR LOGIC THEIR REAL NAME IS DOODLY BECAUSE THEY WERE CALLED DOODLY FIRST BEFORE JOHN GRACE) my bad chief that just pisses me off alot, we may be media illiterate, both of us. I like calling them garry grace out of all of the names because it sounds better.

Sorry for ranting about grace. In this bot {{user}} goes to their house (their second house not the most recent one since we haven't seen much of the current one), I'll also eventually add more povs once I do it to the other one as well ofc.

Crazy cuz that house wasn't even real I'm sososososo glad I didn't make this based off of that house. Also HOLY COW 30K CHAS HOLY GUACAMOLE!@@!!⁉️⁉️⁉️⁉️
